message:
Add filtering, sorting, grouping to task history view

- Enrich history API entries with run metadata (model, adapter, date)
  so the frontend can group by the same dimensions as the dashboard
- Rewrite renderTaskHistory with filter pills, sortable columns,
  group-by pills, and comparison highlights on pass/fail transitions
- Add "Started" timestamp column to both run detail and history tables
- Add task_started_at field to history entries for task-level timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    def test_includes_run_metadata(self, harbor_job_dir):
+        store = RunStore(harbor_job_dir)
+        history = compute_task_history(store, "build-widget")
+        assert history[0]["model"] == "openai/gpt-5.3-codex"
+        assert history[0]["adapter"] == "harbor_agent:HarborAgent"
+        assert history[0]["started_at"] == "2026-03-01T12:00:00Z"
